title: Temporary health care coverage - Canada.ca
content:
## Temporary health care coverage
The Interim Federal Health Program (IFHP) provides limited and temporary health care coverage until you’re eligible for provincial or territorial insurance or leave Canada. This coverage can vary depending on your immigration status.
Sign in to the secure Medavie Blue Cross portal
- check if you’re eligible
- find health care providers
- get more information on benefits Sign in or create an account
Sign in or create an account

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
